text: I have never received such terrible customer service. The driver calls me asking for directions and I tell him exactly how to get here. He was two blocks so I went outside to wait. When he arrives he goes on to shove the paper in my face yelling and screaming in my face because he could not find the address. The sauce for the calzone was ice cold, the dough was not fully cooked, and the salad was huge but came with an extremely tiny cup of dressing. Needless to say I will NEVER order from here again.
